title: [FIRRTL] Negative Signed Literal error
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp12: SInt<4>
    tmp12 <= SInt<4>(-4)
```
Compiled with `firtool --lower-to-rtl` produces this error:

```python
top_mod.fir:4:22: error: expected '.' in floating point literal
    tmp12 <= SInt<4>(-4)
                     ^
```
